calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Appearances:
Shannon B. Jones, Esq. for Plaintiff 444 De Haro, LP.
Plaintiff's witness, David Murphy also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Caxton, Inc. as follows:
Damages of $431,783.28
Attorney fees and costs in total of $4,131.55
For the total of &435,914.83
Judgment signed in open court.
